verse.name: V1
verse.lines: My heavenly home Is bright and fair, I feel like traveling on, No pain, nor death Can enter there, I feel like traveling on.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Yes, I feel like traveling on, I feel like traveling on; My heavenly home Is bright and fair, I feel like traveling on.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Its glittering towers the sun outshine, I feel like traveling on; That heavenly mansion shall be mine, I feel like traveling on.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Let others seek a home below, I feel like traveling on; Which flames devour, Or waves o'er flow, I feel like traveling on.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: The Lord has been so good to me, I feel like traveling on; Until that blessed home I see, I feel like traveling on.
